meaning: n.寺庙里的杂役,教堂司事
examples: "If that be all," replied the sexton, "he can learn that with me."
The sexton came by and saw his master, the parson, running behind three girls.
The sexton, however, remained standing motionless that the boy might think he was a ghost.
Sexton notes that the athletics department generates 70 percent of its own operating budget.
Jonathan Sexton's penalty edged Leinster 11-10 ahead at half-time but Munster took control after the break.
